hero.title: Let's build something.
hero.intro: The form below reads like a brief, not a checkout. Fill in what you know, leave the rest blank - we answer everything personally.
hero.imageAlt: Hides in production at the Kings International tannery

uk.label: Overseas Subsidiary - United Kingdom
uk.address: 18, Kenton Park Road, Harrow, Middx. HA3 8TY, UK

steps.title: You send the brief
steps.body: Fill in what you know - the form below or a plain email both work.

steps.title: We scope it
steps.body: The export desk in Kanpur reviews materials, quantities and timeline, and replies with real answers.

steps.title: We sample or quote
steps.body: Depending on the request, you'll get a quote directly or a counter-sample proposal to approve first.
